# Portal.view.home.parts.Colors: support for mobile

![Screenshot 2024-07-21 at 17 26 19](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/86feb456-a806-4d87-9779-8b6b8b36d5a6)

this one is tricky, since we have very little space. the controls height need to get a lot smaller.

* removing the popups checkbox, only using icons for the charts, table buttons
* reducing the width of the number fields (if possible)
* and / or making all controls smaller in general
